name: Community Service
description: Dedicated to serving our local community through volunteer initiatives, food drives, and community partnerships. We believe in making a tangible difference in the lives of those around us.

name: Tutoring
description: Empowering younger students through peer tutoring in various subjects. Our tutors provide personalized support to help students succeed academically and build confidence.

name: Events
description: Organizing and coordinating memorable events that bring the NHS community together. From fundraisers to celebrations, we create opportunities for connection and engagement.

name: Fundraising
description: Raising funds for charitable causes and school initiatives. Our creative fundraising campaigns support local nonprofits and provide scholarships for deserving students.

name: Leadership
description: Developing future leaders through workshops, mentorship programs, and leadership conferences. We equip members with the skills needed to lead effectively in any setting.

name: Social Impact
description: Addressing important social issues through awareness campaigns and advocacy. We work to create positive change on campus and in our community.
